name: Adaptive Start Page
description: Highly customizable new tab page with tiles, generative backgrounds, and bookmarks integration.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: script-src 'self'; object-src 'none'; connect-src 'self' https://wttr.in; img-src 'self' data: blob: https: http:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; base-uri 'none'; form-action 'none'; frame-ancestors 'none'
